name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new feature or improvement for GitPhone"
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ankittroy-21
---

## ✨ Feature Summary

<!-- A one-line description of the feature you're requesting -->



## 🎯 Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Why is this needed? -->
<!-- Example: "As a user, I struggle to X because Y..." -->



## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you'd like this to work -->



## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Any other approaches you considered? Why did you choose this one? -->



## 🖼️ Mockups / Examples

<!-- Screenshots, sketches, or links to similar features in other tools -->



## 📊 Impact

<!-- Who benefits from this? Backend users, extension users, or both? -->
- [ ] Backend (Telegram bot / API)
- [ ] VS Code Extension
- [ ] Both

## 📋 Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, references, or related issues -->
